description: Endless runner — neon orb weaves through scrolling gates with trail effects and close-call bonuses
prompt: Build a neon-themed endless runner game with HTML5 canvas. A glowing orb moves left and right to dodge scrolling gates. Add: particle trail behind the orb, close-call bonus points for near misses, increasing speed, score tracking, neon glow effects. Use dark theme with purple (#a78bfa) and cyan (#67e8f9) color scheme. Mobile touch support.

tasks.subject: Create game canvas and core loop
